title: MTS/Immersive Vehicles - New Cars
description: The New Cars mod is an addon for Immersive Vehicle or Transport Simulator. The package includes 44 cars
body:
### **!!!PLEASE NOTE!!!**
For workers of this type of transport, it is necessary to fully Immersive Vehicle(Transport Simulator) - https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-vehicles

**What is in this modpack:**
Lamborgini Urus, Mercedes G63 AMG, Hennessey Venom F5, BMW M4 Competition, Aston Martin DBX, Bentley Continental GT 2024, Audi E-Tron GT and others.
